messages.content: No still going on the road

Hello! Just checkin in on you. You got the goood cabin weather i see 😁 Just a quick thing. If you leave the cabin clean as you found it. I can give you 50 BGN back for the cleaning. Due to the snow our cleaning lady cannot go. She is in the 70s.
Ohh my car is toyota corolla 🤷🏻‍♂️
I ways go there with a Renault [NAME], keep in mind it is an offroad place. You will have an entire mountain for yourself. A normal car can get there but the road is rough. Always*
Hello [NAME] we arrange horse riding for monday
Hi! For sure. 2 people 1 hour each?
[NAME], where we can park the car? Anywhere?
The whole mountain is the land of the house, so all yours. Wherever you want to park.
Can you give us the exact location, please
Its in the google earth link wirh the instructions. What time would you like to check in? [NAME], Damian whay type of car do you have? I am trying to prepare you for the conditions there atm
[NAME], they had to take care of the car

Oh no guys I am so sorry to hear that! 😢 I could have give them a lift! When I called them he told me they already took care of it I would like to offer a free day any day they want! As a small present for the troubles with the car
Bucephalus was the horse of Alexander the Great right?

Yes it was! The name of the cabin is because the place is a horse base with lots of horses wandering around. [NAME], the check ij is from 3pm. At what time would you like to arrive? It is self check in. For the horses how do you feel about tomorrow morning around 10? [NAME], for the horse riding, you can send the amount to my revolut. Is 200 lev. Here is the information: IBAN: LT[PHONE] BIC: REVOLT21 Beneficiary: Jose Leon Beneficiary address: Benedictushof 326, 4133 AK, [NAME], [NAME], NL
They have a issue with the car Please call him
I already called him. I told him, if he needs help he can let me know
Perfect 🤩 The car is full of stuff We’re ready

The logs outside may have frozen, I left plenty inside but, I recommend as soon as the fire is going, to keep bringing new inside and putting them under the fireplace to warm up. Awesome! Enjoy the adventure
We will probably be there around 3 How is the road?
It's muddy, I recommend stopping at the park and walk point marked on the Google Earth link
Great! I would like to book a horse ride for 2

Awesome. I need the following information: Experience of the riders: first time/beginner/intermediate/expert Weight Age Exact date and time you would like the horse and the guide to pick you up. They will be there in front of the door of the cabin. And you will like to ride for 1 hour, right? Depending on the amount of time the route will be selected
oh ok, no worries we will get there with my car 😅

For the other days is no problem And if you need anything tomorrow I will go there so I can bring it up for you guys And ofcourse no extra changing or anything. Just that today I have a friends birthday
Is it necessary? I will be renting a car That’s good information :D
Yes I will recommend a 4x4, in case you need transportation it can also be arranged
Ok i will book Sorry how much trip with horse For 2 people
[NAME], so it's 100 lev per person for 1 hour, this includes all the gear and a guide to show you around the area [NAME], how are you? Almost time 👌 do you know at what time you will check in?
Do we hike to the place itself or How accessible is it by car
Car can go there I just got a picture of a Tesla there
We go from base to the cabin with the horse or with the car?
With the horse In that way you don't have to pay for extra transportation
Thanks tot zo Hey [NAME]. Do you have the number of the horse stable?
Hi [NAME], Something happened? Can I assist with something. I have the direct number of Nadia not really the horse stable itself
I understand but we have no choice so hope the location is correct ☺️

It's been on airbnb for 2 years and it's booked everyday. So the location is for sure correct 😄😆 Just be careful please. The road is rough and it's really dark. Call me if there is any issue: [PHONE] Check the Google Earth link very very good so you get familiar with the entire area. I added comments on all points
How far away is the walking distance of the cabin from a paved road?

Paved road very far, in the village bachevo. This area is an area without a paved road. The whole road is a grey road. It's the biggest horse base in Bulgaria. [NAME], you are in the middle of wild, raw nature as soon as you leave bachevo. Normal cars can get there, and 99% of our guests are with normal cars, but expect a bumpy road and with snow. We could arrange transportation from bachevo to the cabin and back. There is some extra cost for that. There are also horse tours and ATVs. People go there often for this type of tourism
Good morning! Just to confirm the guy is coming this morning for horse back riding?
Hi [NAME], but the time have been changed to 12 pm Due to weather being a bit wet. At 12 ill be perfect and more enjoyable
Können wir den Transport für Sonntag buchen? Wir werden frühmorgens von Sofia nach Razlog fahren.
Sure thing. What time would you like to be picked up? [PHONE] Whatsapp me the approx time you will be arriving ok? Let's keep in contact Sunday
I want to ride the horse and also he. Can we not do it together?

Sorry i meant yes one hour is perfect Just because you guys are new to horse riding they will pick you up around 5 with the car and bring you to the horse base. Otherwise it will be horse riding around the cabin. But for new riders is better to do it in a controlled and safe environment first. 5 pm around here please This is my revolut link for the payment to confirm the booking: revolut.me/driftdwells [NAME], let me know if this is confirmed 🙏
Can we pay by card for the horse riding We arrived maybe an hour ago

By revolut please Awesome. All smooth and good? Left a present for you guys there. Enjoy. Cool it in the creek Hey [NAME], could you please let me know what time you check out Oh man you guys left the place so clean! Thank you so much. As a little thank you for that. I would love to invite you and your girlfriend to stay at the new place is am building. On my cost ofcourse. Driftdwells.com/the-valley We will do a couple of try outs before fully opening and i would like you guys to test one of the A frames out. Lets arrange it if you guys are up to it!
Is it a gravel road from the main road that you need to reach it by
Its 3km gravel road up to the park and walk. After that just 200 meters walking
200lv have been sent Hello. Could you please confirm the horse riding reservationfoe Monday 17th at 13:00?
Hi [NAME] it's confirmed and all arranged for you 🙏
I am ready) no worries. That is exactly what I am looking for What about horse ride?
Trip** Let me try to arrange it for you. I will message the people
I was going to message you We have problem with the car I think we can’t come
Oei! You know what I can do for you. Select a day in March and you can come for free I cannot move the dates as it's too fast But I can give you a free night somewhere in March Does that sound good?
Around 3pm. We are with high car but its not 4x4 Which road colour is route A

If you don't have 4x4 I recommend stopping at the park and walk For the horse riding is 100 BGN per person per hour To confirm the reservation You will not have coverage there so I recommend sending it before you head there Good morning! Let me know when you check out. Just to be around in case you need any assistance on the road!
I will try to go by my car I just booked Is there a BBQ available to use?
There is BBQ, kitchen with gas Just be aware everything is very basic
in this case that we could not reach the accommodation due to weather changes, what can we do?
I saw you guys walking there. You had a Duke right? You where 2 minutes from the park and walk spot
Okay I saw it, we're coming by car Where is the lock with the numbers On the X?
Yes 1636 On the x I hope everything went oke with the checkin. I forgot to take my bottle of whiskey, just to let you know, that one is not included in the cabin 😆
Hi [NAME] are already on the road. Thank you. It was cool experience to stay in the cabin.

Did you enjoy it? The place is there to protect the forest and avoid ilegal deforestation. I know it's a very specific experience for nature lovers. I am curious as a non camping person if you enjoyed it?
Great how is the road to the cabin? I assume it isn't too bad but a limestone track?

Oh it's a wild road It's in the middle of the forest but normal cars can get there But is grey road for sure A lot of atv horse riding and buggy riding in the area If you want to be taken there by jeep Is also possible
[NAME], we would like to use the hot tube and what are the offers for the horse riding

Great. So the cost of the wood is 50 BGN. It takes a whole day of wood, that's why we have an extra charge for that. The wood for the house is included in the price. It's just for the hottub an extra cost for wood. The horse riding is 100BGN per hour per rider. Including all gear and one guide
Ok We come at 15:00 And I don’t understand this location Do you have in waze or google maps

Just to make sure we are on the same page. Do you understand this is a very offgrid experience/location. The location is far from everything. It's not in waze or Google Maps. [NAME], be prepared for offgrid. Take precautions as if you were going camping
There is no toilet paper. We searched.
I will make sure they bring it ASAP.
do people shower in the winter? I got matches too
[NAME], I normally heat water in the gas stove, fill the bathtub with hot water and take a quick bath
Hello [NAME] there a shower in the cabin ? Thank yoy

[NAME], thanks for your inquiry. there is an offgrid shower in which you have to heat the water manually. It's an offgrid cabin, so we are not connected to water. But you can bathe in the bathroom as long as you heat the water in the stove first. It's not complicated, but it's not the same as opening the shower at home
Even a cold! Maybe even a hanging shower bag You built the cabin?

So there are some ways to take a shower there. The ones that I have noticed that people do: 1. The thing for watering the plants they fill it up with water and leave it in the sun all day. End of the day the temperature is nice. 2. Fill the hottub with hot water from the kettle and get a hot bath 3. The rain water collection outside is clean water that I have seen people use for showers. Yes I built it myself
Hi [NAME], is there a Bathroom? Couldnt see anything at the pictures. Kind regards, Alisa
Hi [NAME], yes. But it's a composting toilet
It’s amazing … Just one question how the bathroom and the toilet are working 😅
Its a composting toilet 😁 Básically, do your thing and cover it with compost that is next to the toilet
[NAME], I wanted to ask about the toilet/ bathroom situation? I didn't saw any on the photos. Thanks

[NAME], toilet is a composting Toilet. And shower is very old school as the cabin is not connected to water. It's more similar to camping 🏕 There are pictures of the toilet and shower situation. There is lots of water around the land. But it's definitely closer to camping
There are also money, a used razor in the shower. We wait for the toilet paper. Thank you.

She told me she was just there All good now? 😊 Let me know if there is anything else I can do for you. I am currently in my honeymoon. That's why I left the hotel service take care of the appartement. Unfortunately I was not expecting it to be anything less than perfect. So I am a bit worried now.
We arrived. Is there any toilet paper? We don’t find any. Also there is 3 towels and not 4.
There must be all there. I will ask the hotel cleaning service. Which is the one taking care of that
Thank you so much, I have one question should I bring gallons of hot water to take a shower?

There Is a water source in the land, and to make it hot is very easy, just heat it up in the stove and fill up the bath tub. Just like it the old days As long as the fire place is going the entire cabin is on a nice temperature
And lastly, the metal component in the bathroom on the right side, do we need to fill it up with water?

[NAME], normally is a matter of adding water, and you will have a bath with hot water while the fireplace is going. I think there is water inside It makes some noise, but don't worry is an open system so no issue with steam building up If that is too much hassle for a bath we heat water on the kitchen and use the metal element next to the bad to just take a quick shower
Hi [NAME]. Do you have a full equipped bathroom with shower and hot water or it is only the hot tub outside?

Hi [NAME], Thanks for your inquiry. There is currently no shower, and the toilet is a composting toilet. Composting toilets are very clean and without smell. It's a great green alternative to traditional toilets. Keep in mind that this is a cabin in the woods in real raw nature. Everything there is self-sufficient and aligned with nature
[NAME], totally forgot to mention that the led lamps in the bathroom stopped working on the first night after the boiler started steaming
I will check that after the guest leave that is hosting now. Thank you for letting me know. Where you able to use the hot water?
Good morning, I wanted to ask about water, is there water in the bathroom? And how do we fill the external bathtubs? Regards Anita

Hi [NAME], The toilet works with a composting toilet. The bathtub is filled manually. The house is not connected to any water source as it is advertised as fully offgrid. There are many ways to get water to the property, but all of them require just a bit of work. For example, the creek next to the house has clean water 24/7 running there. There are mineral water spots marked on the google Earth link We have a water boiler that needs to be filled manually, which heats the water.
[NAME], there is human hair all over the bed sheets and in the toilet too. So yes, they could do a better job with the cleaning
I am so sorry about that. This is the cleaning company from the hotel belmont itself. We where testing it out for the first time. They are quite expensive even
Dear Jose My girlfriend and I are considering to rent you charming cabin but we are wondering if there are access to toilet facilities? Kind regards Martin
Hi [NAME], Thanks for your message. The toilet is inside the cabin, and it's a composting toilet.
The stay was great, we left everything organized and clean, only trash bags are finished It was very nice! Only thing that is missing is a shower

I heard from the cleaning staff that it was very clean and organized. Thank you so much for that. I'll go ahead and give you a 5 star review and compliments from the cleaner. The shower is a bit old-school. But that's because it's offgrid, we don't want to connect to the grid, the water waste management will damage the area. That is why But yeah I know what you mean. Taking a hot shower is a nice feature
Okay 😅 And the bathroom? And also I can’t turn on the heater as well 😞 I tried to connect it with the gas bottle but it didn’t work
The fireplace is the main heater of the house As soon as it properly starts, the cabin will be 25 degrees in a couple of minutes
[NAME], that sounds perfect! Just one last thing that I forgot to ask the first time. Is there some kind of a bathroom and WC as it is not really clear in the pictures?
There is a composting toilet inside the cabin, yes. Have you used one before?

Hey [NAME], we’ll probably be there around 16:30 [NAME], is there water ready there so we can then warm up for taking a shower with? I read some comments that sometimes there is and sometimes there isn’t
Hi! I left a bottle of 5 liters for drinking and many empty cans. For showering I recommend taking from the creek. Which is in the land

I see. We don’t mind the composting toilet but we need to have some option to shower, is the bath tub inside working with hot water? If there is something to clean ourselves properly we would love to book right now
There is a way to use it, but it involves heating water manually in the stove and then using it.

We haven’t been camping before. We will bring drinking water with us. Food and cooler bag. [NAME], where do we get water for the shower or there’s no way to shower? The water source you marked on the map is dry
Hi! There are 4 water spots on the map. Lots of our guests, including me use water from the creek. It's just around the corner and it's clean water

Hi :) yes it worked well with the hottub! We startet at ca. 10 am making the fire and around 9pm we sat in the hottub. All right, thanks. We brought the trash to a trash place and the compost in the forest.

Guys I left you a 5 star review. You were fantastic guests and I am very thankful for your visit. Thanks again, I hope you had a good time, and you are fully recharged from nature and you found rest in my little cabin.

Hi [NAME] left in the early morning because it was snowing really bad and my phone didn’t have battery so I missed your message Sorry about that we washed the dishes but didn’t do the bed / toilet as I didn’t see your message
I understand absolutely no worries i will try to go there myself. The most important thing is... Did you had a good time?

Hi I would like to book your house in Bachevo for three days, but unfortunately I saw some reviews and some people say there is no bathroom or it can’t be used. Can you give me more information about the bathroom situation. Thank you in advance!

Hi [NAME]! Let me try to explain the bathroom situation: There is a composting toilet for number 1 and number 2. That works very easily. Just do your thing in a normal toilet, and instead of flushing, you cover it with composting material. This is very hygienic and has no smell. For showering, we recently added a hottub, and you can shower outside. The setup is very manual. We are currently building an inside shower. But I am the only one building and it takes me a bit of time. Until now, everyone found the setup very easy and the hottub has been recently added. But again, is something like camping but way more luxurious. I must add that you are currently seeing the old price. As I am adding new features like the outdoors hottub/jacuzzi and the new season is coming, the price will increase. Make sure to book soon to keep the old price.

Hi [NAME]! Super interested to book for this weekend. I have two questions - is the shower now running as I can see in some reviews that it wasn't yet functional in september? Also is there plenty of dry wood and is it the only heating option? Thank you very much!

Hi [NAME], Thanks for your inquiry. I think these are the last free days of December There is no running water in the cabin. There is a bathtub, and you have to heath water manually in the stove or the fireplace to take a bath or to shower. There is plenty of firewood, and in the bedroom, there is a zibro Japanese heater as well.

She can come and leave new bed sheets because that’s the only thing that really bothers us and there is only one roll of toilet paper so she can bring one more. Don’t make her clean the whole apartment now. We don’t have to be here when she comes, do we?

The bed sheets are supposed to be freshly washed. But I will make her bring new. Just leave the keys at the keylock. I am honestly hoping the hair on the bed is from her when she was making the bed. But that color sheets is not the one that was yesterday there with the previous guest. That I can confirm! So they are washed. Just very annoying that she didn't wear a har net or something

The truth is we had other expectations about the place. Several things don't work. The jacuzzi, which was one of the things that caught our attention when booking, was not working. Neither did the shower, the stove was not useful at least for making coffee. I think the site needs maintenance.

Guys I am so sorry to hear that. We have a new company for cleaning and taking care of the place but I guess something went wrong. Would you feel better if I give you 1 night back? That would be 100 bgn? About the hottub I know I send this message before : The bathtub is out of service at the moment because we are doing maintenance, it's too hot for the hottub We are doing maintenance to it at the moment, it has to be empty for a couple of days But I am so so sorry it didn't meet your expectations. I could also offer you a free stay when the hottub is ready. And I will make sure I check personally that everything is working, I will also speak with the new Company to see what is going on

No worries, it's normal for us to respect the place and leave it tide up Just to know for future upgrades maybe rethink the front door, because it hard to open and close, maybe some light in the bedroom area and in the bathroom for some reason the led light didn't work

We did an upgrade to the decking, build a new one, but now the door is indeed getting stuck. The problem is that we have to cancel all the bookings in order to fix it. And people are not happy about that, so I am waiting for a little space in between guest to go and change it The light is a new issue, I will do that right away, and yes. I will add some lights in the bedroom. Thank you so much for the tips

Hello! I would like to book the cabin for 12-14th of [NAME], but first I have a few questions. What is included in the kitchen? Is there an oven or hot plate? I alsо read in the reviews that the shower is a work in progress. I want to ask is it ready yet?

Hi [NAME], the kitchen has everything you need. Just no oven yet. We were looking into buying one. Maybe when you come it will be there but I make no promises as the cabin is fully booked, so it doesn't give me any chance to actually work on it. The bathtub inside is ready by then, 95% of the work is done, just testing some pipes now, which I will be doing this week

Hi José, sorry to reply so late, did not have any connection. We arrived yesterday late afternoon and love the place. [NAME], we run out of sawdust for the toilet, is there any in the cabin? Or where can we find some? And what should we do with the toilet waste and wasted water?

No worries I thought so. The sawdust is just earth, we don't use anything special. The old compost can be left somewhere in a pile of mud far from the house. It will decompose and become earth in some months, we just cover it with more earth. Please just don't put any paper inside the composting, we don't want to damage earth Next to the cabin there are some water plants, you see this place where the grass is different. Leave the water there. Those plants are special plants that clean the water and feed on that Grey water

We will take warm clothes, water pre-cooked food, probably some portable lamps with batteries. I was just wandering how is the shower situation ? If there is any hot water, and second thing, we have an SUV, if there is not that much snow, do you think we’ll manage to get to the cabin ?

Untill the park and walk area marked on the maps, you will be fine. Its just 2 minutes walk from there. Try to go to the cabin is something that I cant tell you if yes or no, as it really depends on the type of car and levels of comfort of the driver. The shower situation is very basic. For heating water you use the stove to heat it. Very old school and basic, be creatieve, same as you would do on a camping trip haha

[NAME], we have arrived. I have a few questions. Was I supposed to bring my own water? I see there is a gyser type setup in the bathroom, but the drum is empty. How do I fill it and where do I get the water? I've never used a composting toilet, could you give me a quick explanation?

Hi .[NAME], Good to hear that you have arrived well. That is great news. I marked many water points along the route towards the cabin. Do not fill the water into the gyser. That is not for our guests. I do ask all my guests to prepare before going to the cabin. I don't think it's a good idea to wait till you are there without phone signal to start preparing. Basically the composting toilet works as following: Use it and then cover it with compost Compost is earth that you will find in the back where we cut the wood [NAME], just checking how its all going there? Is there anything i can help with [NAME], just one last thing we offer all our guest. If you would leave the cabin as you found it. We give 50 BGN back for the cleaning

Thank youu, i will check for the transportation then. And once you confirm to me the way back i ll book right away On the ameneties it says that there is no hot water, and that there is camera inside the listing. Is it correct ? For the shower its ok but the cameras its a bit not private
There is no camera inside the shower ofcourse 😅 The camera is around the property

Hi! Me and my husband stumbled across this little piece of heaven and needles to say we were charmed! I wanted to get more information for a few things if possible. Is there a shower or a bathtub and does it have warm water running from it? Also are pets allowed in general or are only service animals allowed?

Hey! Thanks for your kind message. And I can guarantee you will enjoy it. There is a hottub outside, and there is a bathtub inside with hot water. But the bathtub only works when the temperatures are above 5 degrees. We can not risk freezing pipes, but for your dates, I am sure you will be all right! And yes, pets are allowed.
Can we use the hot tub now?

You are always allowed to use the hottub. The 21 they will film a TV commercial in the cabin and we will clean and change the water of the hottub for them. [NAME], the temperatures are extremely low at night and the water freezes almost instantly. Keep in mind that you will have to be an entire day outside heating a fire in order to be able to use it. From experience I know that the majority of our guests find that not doable, as there is so many other things to do there, instead of being all day watching over a hottub in order to use it at night. The TV commercial is not for the cabin is for a medicine ad and they want to use the hottub, they are paying extra for us to do all the work of heating it up and preparing it a day before. If it was me going there to relax, i will not bother doing that and i will enjoy the rest of the place. Which has so much more to offer
What about the water supply for the jacuzzi
Hi [NAME], [NAME], your dates are not available anymore.
What about the tub? How would you fill it?

Its filled with water from the creek, we changed it 2 days ago, just keep in mind that it's water from the creek: 1. Its clean but has a bit of sand 2. Its an open tub to avoid dangerous bacteria growth, but that means leaves and insects can get it, so it's always necessary to clean it with the net 3. There is a cost for wood, if you want to use our wood, it's 50BGN and it takes all day to heat up. You only have to pay it if you use our wood. If all you want to do is take a dip in the water, the creek runs all along the property in all directions.
Yes And hot tub also Ok I will text you before 12
The hottub is impossible mate. We tried 2 days ago and its extremely cold so its not getting hot at all
Can you give us more information on how to use the hot tub?

Absolutely! It takes 8 hours to heat up. So start early. It's a very easy system. There is basically a fireplace inside the hottub. Start it, and let it burn all day. At the end of the day, you will have a comfortable 40+ degrees. It uses a lot of wood, normally wr charge something extra for it, but this time is a present. Just make sure to use all the very dry wood for the cabin, as being hot inside is the most important. There is plenty of wood outside. There is some woods that are very dry and others that are more fresh, combine them so it burns longer.
Hi. Is the outside jacuzzi working, and how is it refilled by water ?
[NAME], it works with burning wood, so it's working but currently is very cold. Probably you will not use it as it takes 8 hours to heath in this weather
Hola [NAME], como hemos leído te avisamos que queremos hacer uso del jacuzzi. Muchas gracias

Hi [NAME], the jacuzzi takes a whole day to heat up. There is a cost of 50 BGN for the wood if you wish to have the wood from us. The hottub is open, and filled with river water. Meaning you always have to clean it, as little leaves ans stufd from the forest goes in it.
[NAME], we plan on using the hot tub, please prepare it It would be possible right?

It takes a whole day to heat. Just keep that in mind we change the water and leave it there. You have to heat it from the morning till night to get it on temperature. The cost for the wood is am additional 50 BGN. I recommend to go to the property, see if you feel like using the tub. If yes, then just use the wood and you can pay for it after. If not, no worries then I see your first message now. Look I am a bit worried that you booked the place without knowing the type of property this is. Off grid means connected to nothing, no water or electricity. We have solar for lights inside the house, there is a water source 50 meters from the property but that is it. This property is really for natura and offgrid aficionados. Who enjoy putting the extra work to get the basic needs. Are you sure this is what you are looking for?
To heat up the hot tub, do we just put coal and wood in the metal department?
Yes and it takes a whole day, so start very early
[NAME], we will love to use the hot tub , is it possible in this weather? Hello?

[NAME], the water is frozen and it takes an entire day to heat it up, while keeping the wood on all day If you have the patience and the perseverance for that, then yes. There is only an additional cost foe the wood of 50 BGN
Hello [NAME], we are coming in 2 days. We would like to use the hot tub if possible.
[NAME], its possible. There is a fee of 50 BGN for the wood. The usage is free, but if we have to provide the wood there is a cost for it
It said it has a shared hot tub is that correct? The wooden thing on the picture outside

Ah yes there is a hottub, it's not shared. Is just for the guests that have the cabin. The use of it is free, but there is a small additional costing 50 BGN for wood if we have to provide the wood for heating it up
Perfect. Ok for the wood for the tub! We'll discuss the horseback riding and get back to you :)

Allright! Just for your information. The water we use in the hottub is water from the creek. Is clean water, but just so you know there are always small leaves and a bit of sand. It's fresh water but it's still a wild hottub outdoors
[NAME], we would like to try jacuzzi and for now we will skip horse riding:) how can I pay? :)
You can revolut me please: Hey! You can send me money on Revolut by following this link: revolut.me/driftdwells
Ok. We we will go to fishing farm Can you strat heating hot tub? We will be in 1 hour
The hottub takes an entire day to heat. It's not gonna be ready in couple of hours anyways. How was it? 🏡😁
[NAME], [NAME], we love this place and we have only one question. The hot tub in the backyard is working?
[NAME], it's only working when the weather allows it. If it's too cold and the water is frozen then we cannot fill it up
Hi [NAME] . I want it let you know about the hot tub we are planning to use it tomorrow

Hi [NAME], right now it's a bit too late, but besides that I really don't recommend it. Let me explain, there is a 50 BGN fee for the wood, already 3 guests have tried to heat it up, and they give up half way. You have to keep the fire on all day, and going all the time to feed the fire is something very annoying in this weather. If you would stay for more days, then yes, youve done everything walk around discover the area and in a chill day you take care of the fire. But to be honest I think you will give up in the middle of the day aswell, and just spend money on wood 😅🤣 This is my advice
Hey 😊 good morning. We have a reservation for tomorrow, two nights, will we be able to use the hot tub ?
